# Thomas Remodeling & Property Maintenance

Philadelphia-area handyman and property maintenance business offering TV mounting, furniture assembly, drywall repair, painting, fixtures, faucets, toilet repairs, and landlord turnover services.

## Key pages
- How Much Does TV Mounting Cost in Philadelphia?: https://thomas-remodeling-site.vercel.app/blog/tv-mounting-cost-philadelphia.html
- Rental Turnover Repair Checklist for Philadelphia Landlords: https://thomas-remodeling-site.vercel.app/blog/rental-turnover-repair-checklist-philadelphia-landlords.html
- Drywall Patch vs Replacement: What Philadelphia Homeowners Should Know: https://thomas-remodeling-site.vercel.app/blog/drywall-patch-vs-replace-philadelphia.html
- How Much Does Faucet Replacement Cost in Philadelphia?: https://thomas-remodeling-site.vercel.app/blog/faucet-replacement-cost-philadelphia.html
- Small Repairs That Help Philadelphia Landlords Rent Units Faster: https://thomas-remodeling-site.vercel.app/blog/small-repairs-help-landlords-rent-faster-philadelphia.html

Contact: 267-242-2133, thomasremodelingandprop.maint@gmail.com
